summary: Frontend-only testing of Meta Extrator (client-side metadata extraction PWA). Validated LGPD cookie banner + persistence, policy dialog (8 sections) from both cookie banner and footer links, file upload pipeline with hashing (MD5/SHA-1/SHA-256) and metadata extraction for a TXT file, PDF/JSON report downloads with sanitized filenames, manipulation-unsupported notice for generic files, reset flow, and contact dialog mailto flow. Security headers (CSP, X-Content-Type-Options nosniff, referrer no-referrer) verified present. 13/15 automated checks passed; remaining 2 (mailto capture) confirmed by visible success toast and code review.
console_warnings_observed: CSP directive 'frame-ancestors' is ignored when delivered via <meta> element — this is expected/harmless; that directive only works as an HTTP header. Other CSP directives are correctly applied.
Cloudflare insights beacon blocked by CSP (https://static.cloudflareinsights.com). It is injected by the preview environment, not the app; not a functional defect.

Radix Dialog 'Missing Description or aria-describedby' warnings on PolicyDialog/ContactDialog/PrivacyPolicyDialogFooter — A11y nit; non-blocking. Could be fixed by adding <DialogDescription> or aria-describedby={undefined}.

test_results.csp_meta_tag_present: PASS (672 chars, includes default-src, script-src, etc.)
test_results.contact_dialog_opens_and_send_triggers_m: PASS (toast 'Abrindo seu cliente de e-mail…' shown; window.location.href = mailto:... cannot be intercepted via JS in Chromium because window.location is a special binding, but source review of ContactDialog.jsx confirms CRLF stripping via .replace(/[\r\n]+/g, ' ') and encodeURIComponent of subject+body)
test_results.mailto_crlf_sanitization: PASS (verified by code review at lines 29-40 of ContactDialog.jsx)

code_review_observations: ContactDialog correctly sanitizes CR/LF in subject, name and email fields before building mailto: URL (lines 29-31).
encodeURIComponent is applied to both subject and body — safe against email header injection.
CookieBanner uses correct localStorage key 'me_lgpd_consent_v1' with versioned JSON payload.
reportGenerator.triggerDownload (not opened here but used) produces filenames prefixed 'meta-extrator_' that have no control chars in observed downloads.
Home.jsx MAX_SIZE = 10 GB matches spec; toast error if exceeded.
CSP 'frame-ancestors' directive is ineffective via <meta>; consider moving to server response header if anti-clickjacking is desired. Non-blocking.
Multiple Radix Dialog components are missing DialogDescription/aria-describedby — minor a11y warning logged in console for PolicyDialog, ContactDialog, PrivacyPolicyDialogFooter.
action_items: (Optional / minor) Add <DialogDescription> or aria-describedby={undefined} to the Dialog components (PolicyDialog, PrivacyPolicyDialogFooter, ContactDialog) to silence Radix a11y warnings.

(Optional) The CSP <meta> tag includes 'frame-ancestors' which browsers ignore in <meta>; if anti-clickjacking is required, set X-Frame-Options or Content-Security-Policy via HTTP header on the hosting server.
seed_data_creation: Created a temporary .txt file with 66 bytes of sample text for the upload test (deleted after test). No seed data persisted server-side (app is client-only).
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is 100% client-side; no backend to test (/api exists but unused). Critical flows validated: LGPD banner + persistence, policy dialog (8 sections, both entry points), generic TXT upload → hash → extract → PDF/JSON download, manipulation-unsupported state for non-image/PDF/Office, reset, and contact mailto. JPEG-with-EXIF / PDF / DOCX manipulation flows were NOT exercised in this iteration (TXT was chosen as the lowest-risk smoke test per spec). To extend coverage, drop a real JPEG (e.g. https://github.com/ianare/exif-samples/raw/master/jpg/gps/DSCN0010.jpg) and verify ManipulationPanel shows strip-metadata-btn + open-edit-dialog-btn, and that GPS map renders via Leaflet. Also: window.location.href = 'mailto:...' navigation cannot be intercepted in Chromium via Object.defineProperty on Location prototype, so verify mailto contents via the source code or by overriding the entire window.location object before app loads.
